tweets.text: Today is #NationalFentanylAwarenessDay. As a partner of Operation Free 3.0 Virginia, last week CBP attended the First Responder Awareness Training to learn fentanyl safety for law enforcement. Officers also got to experience a mock fentanyl lab and watch a @CBPAMO Blackhawk demo. https://t.co/ZhYf0zwaGp
tweets.text_resolved: Today is #NationalFentanylAwarenessDay. As a partner of Operation Free 3.0 Virginia, last week CBP attended the First Responder Awareness Training to learn fentanyl safety for law enforcement. Officers also got to experience a mock fentanyl lab and watch a @CBPAMO Blackhawk demo. https://t.co/ZhYf0zwaGp

media.alt_text: Lab equipment sits on a display table as presentations are made during a multi-agency lawenforcement event on fentanyl at The Farm at Eagle Ridge Training Center in King George, Va., April 23, 2025. CBP Photo by Glenn Fawcett

U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers and agents listen as Virginia Deputy Secretary of
Public Safety Marcus Anderson delivers opening remarks during a multi-agency law
enforcement event on fentanyl at The Farm at Eagle Ridge Training Center in King George, Va., April 23, 2025. CBP Photo by Glenn Fawcett

U.S. Customs and Border Protection Air and Marine Operations UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter
departs after attending a multi-agency law enforcement event on fentanyl at The Farm at Eagle Ridge Training Center in King George, Va., April 23, 2025. CBP Photo by Glenn Fawcett

A U.S. Customs and Border Protection Air and Marine Operations air interdiction agent poses
for a photo in front of a UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter with partner law enforcement personnel
while attending a multi-agency event on fentanyl at The Farm at Eagle Ridge Training Center inKing George, Va., April 23, 2025. CBP Photo by Glenn Fawcett

tweets.text:
#ICYMI seizing counterfeits is national security.

CBP officers in El Paso, TX seized a shipment of counterfeit jewelry that resembled Van Cleef & Arpels’ “Alhambra” line. The fake goods had a MSRP of $9M+ had they been real.

➡️ https://t.co/XPB1YygtMJ https://t.co/KFbu4FaBLa

Check the résumé:

‣ Over 66K deportations by CBP, contributing to DHS's total of over 142K
